# number / table

The **number** type's `data-view.cell` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.Cell({ match: "number", ... })` — a read-only
`NumberCell` that renders the projected value as tabular-nums text. Derived
numeric types (e.g. `int`) reuse this cell via the `extends`-chain fallback.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Number field type: data-view table cell (read-only numeric cell).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.Cell` "number" → `NumberCell`
